05a Creating a Notion Account - YouTube.mp4
What's up y'all. I'm going to give you a quick walkthrough on how to sign up for a Notion account. We're really excited about this. We will be using Notion to build our scalable operating systems. So like I said, I'm just going to give you a quick walkthrough so that you're all set up and prepared for our live session tomorrow with your own Notion account that we can start building on. So first, let's go over to whatever your browser of choice is. Then go to Notion. so. So it's N-O-T-I-O-N dot S-O. You'll see their homepage that'll look something like this. Let's click Try Notion Free, the blue. Click this blue button up here in the right corner. Try Notion Free. Then from here, you have an option to sign up with three different email accounts. You can sign up with your Google account, your Apple account, or your personal business address. Again, we will be using this for your businesses, for your scalable operating system, and you will eventually want to share this with your team members. So I would recommend using a business account for this. But for now, I'll just go ahead and sign up with a personal account that I haven't used before.
Hopefully this isn't giving you access to my entire life here. Then we'll come over here You can click, you know, work with your team. The option on the left there, again, is going to allow you to try that for free. Go ahead and click continue. And then, sure, you know, name your workspace. Obviously, your business would be a good name for the workspace. For example, our internal one here at the scalable company is the scalable. I think it's the scalable dashboard. And then we can add a logo later. You don't need to worry about doing that now. Again, just add a workspace here. And then we'll click continue. Don't worry about inviting teammates now. If you are going through the OS with a teammate, that might be a good person to invite.
But otherwise, if you're just going through it alone and we'll be sharing this later, you can always add teammates later. So don't you don't need to worry about that right now. Again, if you're not going through S. O. S. with someone else, just go ahead and click, take me to Notion. If you are, I would add that person there. Once you've done all that, you'll be ready for class tomorrow. So you'll see a lot of templates that they already have for you. Again, you'll land on that start here page. This getting started page, this is what it will look like once you've successfully created a Notion account But once you've done this, go ahead and stop here. Again, we will walk you through setting up your own OS tomorrow, so don't worry too much about what to do with this right now. We just want to make sure that you have this ready for our live session tomorrow. And yeah, please let me know if you have any questions or if you have any issues getting started on this. And again, we'll walk you through what to do from here in class tomorrow. See you all then.
